title: xantolis boniana var. pavieana
intro: Xantolis boniana var. pavieana, also known as a type of shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia, belongs to the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xantolis boniana var. pavieana include its potential to alleviate fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
